name: Martial Solal
abstract: Martial Solal (23 August 1927 – 12 December 2024) was a French jazz pianist and composer.

concerts.label: Kool-Newport Jazz Festival: Mitchel Forman and Martial Solal

about_quotes.speaker: Roy McCurdy
about_quotes.evidence: I lived and I stayed in Paris for a while and lived over there for a little while playing with Martial Solal, the piano player.
about_quotes.doc_title: Roy McCurdy interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, November 16, 1995

about_quotes.speaker: Konitz Lee
about_quotes.evidence: He’s kind of like my French brother ... over the years it’s been a very “brother” kind of feeling with him. To play with him is such a unique experience ... some nice things came out of that collaboration I think.
about_quotes.doc_title: Konitz Lee — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Coleman
about_quotes.evidence: Martial Solal... was leading a trio at the Ringside and they accompanied me... I really enjoyed playing with Martial
